nodes.title: Display Accounts List
nodes.description: When /biz/:bizId/accounts page loads, fetch GET /api/businesses/:bizId/accounts and display accounts in a hierarchical tree view. Each account shows name, code, type, and balance. Supports expand/collapse for parent accounts.

nodes.title: Open Create Account Form
nodes.description: When user clicks 'إضافة حساب' button, display modal form with fields: name (required), code (required), accountType dropdown, parentId dropdown, currencyId dropdown, and allowed links multi-select. Cancel button closes modal.

nodes.title: Submit Create Account
nodes.description: When user fills account form and clicks 'حفظ', triggers POST /api/businesses/:bizId/accounts with form data. Success: closes modal, shows success toast, refreshes accounts list. Failure: shows validation error messages inline.

nodes.title: Edit Account
nodes.description: When user clicks edit icon on account row, opens pre-filled form modal. When user modifies fields and clicks 'حفظ', triggers PUT /api/businesses/:bizId/accounts/:id. Success: closes modal, shows success toast, refreshes list.

nodes.title: Delete Account
nodes.description: When user clicks delete icon on account row, shows confirmation modal 'هل أنت متأكد من حذف هذا الحساب؟'. When user confirms, triggers DELETE /api/businesses/:bizId/accounts/:id. Success: removes account from list, shows success toast. Cancel: closes modal.
